mapper.select:
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, contact, phone, address, is_active FROM CUSTOMER
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND is_active = #{isActive}
ORDER BY customer_id ASC
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, contact, phone, address, is_active FROM CUSTOMER WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CUSTOMER (customer_name, contact, phone, address, is_active) VALUES (#{customerName}, #{contact}, #{phone}, #{address}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE CUSTOMER SET customer_name = #{customerName}, contact = #{contact}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
UPDATE CUSTOMER SET is_active = 0 WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
